div.head: 55. Letter From President Truman to Director of Central Intelligence SmithSource: Truman Library, Papers of Harry S. Truman, President’s Secretary’s Files. No classification marking. President Truman was on vacation at the Little White House in Key West, Florida. A handwritten notation on the letter reads, “air mailed from Key West.”
div.dateline: U.S. Naval Station, Key West, March 8, 1951.
div.p: I have been reading the Intelligence BulletinSee Document 53. and I am highly impressed with it.
I believe you have hit the jackpot with this one.

closer.note: Printed from a copy that indicates Truman signed the original.
